CustomField.description:
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub.
The maximum allowing income for this property and household size. Manually entered. Tip: Use only if required for reporting purposes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The maximum allowing income for this property and household size. Manually entered.
Tip: Use only if required for reporting purposes.
CustomField.label: Maximum Allowable Income
